content.full_text:
June 3, 1976                                A 76-4415


Honorable Jeremy C. Cook
Judge, Superior Court of California
P. O. Box 1011
Modesto, California 95353

Dear Judge Cook:

Thank you for your letter of June 2, 1976 concerning your
financial disclosure statement required pursuant to
Government Code Sections 87200 et seq.

As you have stated, your first statement will be due 30 days
after your anniversary date, the date your current term of
office began. The statement will cover the period from the
effective date of the legislation, May 5, 1976, through the
date of the anniversary of your current term of office.

I am sorry this item was not covered in our letter of May 26,
1976. Please let me know if I may be of additional assistance.

                                        Very truly yours,


                                        REGINA SICILIANO-KUTCHINS
                                        Technical Assistance Program
                                        Coordinator


RSK:mak

bcc: Jeanne-A ✓


Superior Court of California
Stanislaus County
Modesto, California
95354

JEREMY C. COOK, JUDGE                                    June 2, 1976


Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
Post Office Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

Gentlemen:

     I expect to be re-elected this year as a Superior
Court Judge. It is my understanding that a financial
disclosure statement will have to be filed by me in
January pursuant to Government Code sections 87200, et
seq.

     After a review of those sections, your letter of
May 26, 1976, and the instruction manual for form 721,
I am uncertain as to what period the financial disclosure
statement should cover. Does it cover the period January 1,
1971 to December 31, 1976 or does it cover only the calendar
year 1976? I assume it's the latter.

                                        Yours very truly,


                                        _____________________
                                        Jeremy C. Cook, Judge

JCC:dl
